stories.headline: Russian opposition artist Robert Kuzovkov shot dead in exile in Poland
stories.description: Robert Kuzovkov, who used the pseudonym Semyon Skrepetsky, has been known for his caricatures of pol...

stories.headline: India blocks Telegram until Monday due to student exam fraud concerns
stories.description: A viral youth satirical protest movement, the Cockroach Janta Party, has emerged following exam cancellations last month

stories.headline: Messi, Argentina begin World Cup title defence against Algeria: All to know
stories.description: Superstar Lionel Messi is back for a sixth World Cup and leads Argentina into their group match debut against Algeria.

stories.headline: Trump warns ‘all hell will rain down’ if Iran tries to get a nuclear weapon
stories.description: US president also made unusually critical comments about Israel’s military offensive in Lebanon.

stories.headline: Woman in court over fatal Wimbledon school crash
stories.description: Claire Freemantle was driving the car that killed Nuria Sajjad and Selena Lau outside a school in 2023.
